sentences.translationEn: Rami called his mother on the phone.

sentences.translation: Obavijestio ju je da je stigao sigurno.
sentences.translationEn: He told her that he arrived safely.

sentences.translation: Bila je sretna kad je čula njegov glas.
sentences.translationEn: She was happy when she heard his voice.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثَا قَلِيلًا ثُمَّ قَالَا مَعَ السَّلَامَةِ.
sentences.translation: Malo su razgovarali pa se pozdravili.
sentences.translationEn: They talked a little then said goodbye.
